objective: Fix AC-7 validation failure: rewrite byte_bound_terminates_loop to genuinely exceed MAX_TOOL_RESULT_BYTES and assert truncated=true with turns < MAX_TURNS.
key_changes: core/src/explore/agent.rs: rewrote byte_bound_terminates_loop — replaced vacuous 20-call client with ScriptedClient emitting 1,500 hallucinated 'x' tool calls in one response
1,500 × ~93-byte corrective_refusal ≈ 139,500 bytes > MAX_TOOL_RESULT_BYTES (131,072) — byte bound fires on turn 1
Added assertion: assert!(answer.truncated) — byte bound must set truncated = true
Added assertion: assert!(answer.turns < MAX_TURNS) — confirms byte path not turn path fired
No filesystem dependency; hallucinated tool 'x' triggers corrective_refusal() in-process
All 177 tests pass: 126 unit + 32 integration + 18 CLI + 1 doc-test
